hooks.command: input=$(cat); cur=$(printf '%s' "$input" | jq -r '.session_title // ""'); prefix='[nonprofiteer] '; case "$cur" in "$prefix"*) title="$cur" ;; "") title="${prefix}$(basename "$(pwd)")" ;; *) title="${prefix}${cur}" ;; esac; ctx='Invoke the caveman skill (full mode) via the Skill tool now, then respond in caveman style for this entire session. Skill at ~/.claude/skills/caveman. Stays active until the user says stop caveman or normal mode.'; jq -cn --arg t "$title" --arg c "$ctx" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"SessionStart",sessionTitle:$t,additionalContext:$c}}'
